title: summarize.thread input (v1.0.0)
description: Example input schema for a task kind. Shows the shape of a Task.inputs field when Task.kind == 'summarize.thread'. Copy as the starting point for a new kind; replace $id base and the domain-specific fields.

thread_id.description: Stable id of the thread to summarize. Prefer content-addressed ids when possible.

since.description: Only include messages at or after this timestamp. Omit to summarize the whole thread.

audience.description: Who the summary is for. Producers may tune style on this.
